_comment: Lobelia Sackville-Baggins (LTR, {2}{B} flash menace legendary 2/3). ETB target = a creature card in an opponent's graveyard put there from the battlefield this turn (Gap 20). Treasure count = the exiled card's power (exercises CreatePredefinedTokenEffect.dynamicCount). Flow: cast Bitter Downfall ({3}{B} instant) targeting opponent's Snarling Warg (3/4) — Warg dies and lands in opponent's graveyard with the Gap 20 marker set. Flash in Lobelia ({2}{B}) → ETB pauses to target the Warg → Warg exiled → THREE Treasure tokens enter under your control (X = Warg's printed power 3).
